title: Settings
description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.pictureDescription: Public photo shown to customers when they book with you
profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Public information shown to customers when they book with you
profile.name: Name
profile.publicEmailHint: This can differ from the email you use to sign in.
profile.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell customers about yourself and your work

account.title: Account
account.description: Update your name and login email address
account.name: Name
account.resend: Click here to re-send the verification email.
account.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

appearance.title: Appearance settings
appearance.description: Update the appearance settings for your account

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.googleMeetDescription: Connect your Google account so online appointments get a Google Meet link automatically.
integrations.connectedHint: Online bookings assigned to you will include a Meet link once connected.

security.title: Update password
security.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.enabledHint: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
twoFactor.disabledHint: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.

recoveryCodes.title: 2FA recovery codes
recoveryCodes.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recoveryCodes.hint: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click {button} above.

setupModal.enabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
setupModal.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
setupModal.setupDescription: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in
passkeys.emptyHint: Add a passkey to sign in without a password
passkeys.removeDescription: Are you sure you want to remove the "{name}" passkey? You will no longer be able to use it to sign in.
passkeys.registerHint: A name helps you identify this passkey later.
passkeys.notSupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.modalTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.modalDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

avatarUploader.hint: SVG, PNG or JPG. Up to 2MB.
